title: Buying Chickens
description: Buying chickens from John the farmer.
story: I drove a pickup truck and bought 12 white chickens from John and paid in fresh cow milk and cash.

title: Separating Baby Goats
story: We had to catch and separate the baby goats at night so that we could milk their moms in the morning.

title: Milking Cows
story: We milked the cows every morning with a small machine and then strained and chilled the milk.

title: Collected Eggs
description: Every day before noon we would collect and count the chicken eggs.
story: I would collect all the chicken eggs in the morning and separate the easter eggs(the turqioseish eggs) so that we could incubate them.

title: Separating Lambs
description: We separated the lambs every morning.
story: I used to have to chase and catch the lambs every morning, but after two weeks I had socialized them enough to the point where they would come running to me every morning.

title: Black Soldier Flies
description: Took care of black soldier fly larvae.
story: I would take care of the black soldier fly larvae which are a great source of nutrients for chickens but also compost and are great for sustainable farming.

title: Emma the Cat
story: Every day I would pet Emma because she was the cutest cat there.

title: Chicken Coop
description: Cleaning and composting the chicken coop.
story: I had to turn and fluff and add new organic material to the chicken coop almost everyday to keep it clean and fresh

title: Cheese
story: Sometimes we made cheese with the milk from the farm and it tasted great but there was a lot of washing to do after.
